id.description: The ID of the issue status.

name.description: The name of the status in the workflow.

additionalProperties.description: Additional properties that modify the behavior of issues in this status. Supports the properties jira.issue.editable and issueEditable (deprecated) that indicate whether issues are editable.

properties.description: Additional properties that modify the behavior of issues in this status. Supports the properties `jira.issue.editable` and `issueEditable` (deprecated) that indicate whether issues are editable.
